attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Evaluating the Sharpness and Limitations of Bounds on the Frobenius Number

nodes.label: thm_lem_sylvester
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_lem_sylvester : ∀ (a b : ℕ), 1 < a → 1 < b → Nat.Coprime a b → FrobeniusNumber (a * b - a - b) {a, b} := by
  intro a b ha hb hcop; exact frobeniusNumber_pair hcop ha hb

nodes.label: thm_frob_8_32_59
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_frob_8_32_59 : FrobeniusNumber 405 {8, 32, 59} := by
  have hpair : FrobeniusNumber 405 {8, 59} := (by have h := frobeniusNumber_pair (by decide : Nat.Coprime 8 59) (by norm_num : (1 : ℕ) < 8) (by norm_num : (1 : ℕ) < 59); norm_num at h; exact h); have h8 : (8 : ℕ) ∈ AddSubmonoid.closure ({8, 59} : Set ℕ) := AddSubmonoid.subset_closure (by simp); have hcl : AddSubmonoid.closure ({8, 32, 59} : Set ℕ) = AddSubmonoid.closure ({8, 59} : Set ℕ) := le_antisymm (AddSubmonoid.closure_le.mpr (by intro z hz; simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hz; rcases hz with rfl | rfl | rfl; exact AddSubmonoid.subset_closure (by simp); rw [(by norm_num : (32 : ℕ) = 8 + 8 + 8 + 8)]; exact add_mem (add_mem (add_mem h8 h8) h8) h8; exact AddSubmonoid.subset_closure (by simp))) (AddSubmonoid.closure_mono (by intro z hz; simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hz ⊢; tauto)); unfold FrobeniusNumber at hpair ⊢; simp only [hcl]; exact hpair

nodes.label: thm_prop_selmer_fails
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_selmer_fails : ∃ (a b c F : ℕ), (0 < a ∧ a ≤ b ∧ b ≤ c) ∧ Nat.gcd a (Nat.gcd b c) = 1 ∧ ¬ (Nat.gcd a b = 1 ∧ Nat.gcd a c = 1 ∧ Nat.gcd b c = 1) ∧ FrobeniusNumber F {a, b, c} ∧ ¬ (F ≤ 2 * c * (a / 3) - a) := by
  exact ⟨8, 32, 59, 405, by decide, by decide, by decide, thm_frob_8_32_59, by decide⟩

nodes.label: thm_lem_no_subquad_n2
nodes.lean: theorem thm_lem_no_subquad_n2 : ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε → ¬ ∃ (C : ℝ), 0 < C ∧ ∀ (a b F : ℕ), 0 < a → a ≤ b → Nat.Coprime a b → FrobeniusNumber F {a, b} → (F : ℝ) ≤ C * ((a : ℝ) * (b : ℝ)) ^ (1 - ε) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_thm_no_subquad
nodes.lean: theorem thm_thm_no_subquad : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε → ¬ ∃ (C : ℝ), 0 < C ∧ ∀ (a : Fin (n + 2) → ℕ) (F : ℕ), (∀ i, 0 < a i) → Monotone a → Finset.univ.gcd a = 1 → FrobeniusNumber F (Set.range a) → (F : ℝ) ≤ C * ((a 0 : ℝ) * (a (Fin.last (n + 1)) : ℝ)) ^ (1 - ε) := by sorry

title: Evaluating the Sharpness and Limitations of Bounds on the Frobenius Number
